ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone(s) of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the analytics belongs to */,
  "health_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data the analytics belongs to */,
  "effectiveness_score" REAL /* Effectiveness score of the policy (0-1) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., regression, machine learning) */,
  "analysis_output" TEXT /* Output or result of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, policymaker) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions or roles assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy tag */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the policy tag (e.g., category, subcategory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health tag */,
  "health_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the health tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the health tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the health tag (e.g., category, subcategory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy effectiveness entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the effectiveness belongs to */,
  "effectiveness_score" REAL /* Effectiveness score of the policy (0-1) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy effectiveness was evaluated */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used to evaluate the policy effectiveness */,
  "evaluation_description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health effectiveness entry */,
  "health_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data the effectiveness belongs to */,
  "effectiveness_score" REAL /* Effectiveness score of the health data (0-1) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the health effectiveness was evaluated */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used to evaluate the health effectiveness */,
  "evaluation_description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id")
)
